body.notes: Add is_user_turn (from main.py author check), research_mode (purpose-based), cloud_funded (balance + burn rate gate, MIN_DAYS env var). Rename cloud_active→master_cloud. Complexity gates user_turn→cloud: only medium|high. D211.
body.title: InferenceContext: is_user_turn, research_mode, cloud_funded, complexity gate
body.result: D211 local-first routing wired: inference_gateway.py interactive branch tries local (t2) first for low-complexity user turns, cloud (t4) as fallback; main.py passes is_user_turn=True + complexity. Tests: 30 passed.
